---
title: "README: Final Models and Graphs"
format: html
---

This folder includes the explanatory document with all the models run. 

The Quarto document called "Final Measurement Analysis3.3" shows all the models 
run and interpretations of each. The Final Visualizations Quarto document shows 
two examples of the models run. One example is a "good" measurement that had high 
predictive power between the species, and one is a "bad" measurement that does 
not show strong predictive power between species. Final Visualizations 2 shows code
to make the graphs in the slideshow. Most models run  use each measurement was tested 
against the size proxy instead of on each other, as the goal was to determine which 
measurements should be used in the future rather than what combination best 
predicted each species.
